# Logical Or

Logical OR operator with short-circuit evaluation

```perl
$or_result = $x || $y;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Logical Or

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$or_result = $x || $y;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$or_result = $x || $y;
```
